rule: Accept only exact Prize Pack rows where the row is Standard Set Foil and the page-level foil rule maps that row to Cosmos Holofoil. Pokemon ex regular-foil-pattern rows remain blocked until active finish mapping is explicitly governed.

page_rules.four: Foil cards in this set have Cosmos Holofoil except for {{TCG|Pokémon V}} {{TCG|Pokémon V|Pokémon VMAX}}, {{TCG|Pokémon V|Pokémon VSTAR}} and {{TCG|Pokémon ex}} which retain their regular foil patterns.
page_rules.five: Foil cards in this set have Cosmos Holofoil except for {{TCG|Pokémon ex}} and {{TCG|ACE SPEC card}}s which retain their regular foil patterns.
page_rules.six: Foil cards in this set have Cosmos Holofoil except for {{TCG|Pokémon ex}} and {{TCG|ACE SPEC card}}s which retain their regular foil patterns.
